name: Group Lockout Box
shortDescription: Portable box letting every crew member on a shared job lock in their own padlock.
longDescription: For jobs where several people are working on the same isolated equipment, a single lockout point isn't enough — everyone needs to be able to lock in and only leave once their part of the work is done. This portable metal box has multiple external padlock slots plus a lockable main compartment: the equipment's isolation key or hasp goes inside, the box is closed with a primary lock, and every crew member then adds their own padlock to the exterior. The equipment can't be re-energised until every individual has removed their lock.

images.alt: Group Lockout Box supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Multi-person / group lockout on shared isolation points
